title: 以下、進めて。本番環境で動作するか確認せよ。 • 解決しました。Hybrid Failover の即 fail 文言は AGENTS.md で recovery matrix 前提に修正し、run- kernel-council-review.sh には実際の recovery retry を追加しました。最初の council 判定が落ちて も、1 回だけ force_copilot_continuity + gemini/xai backfill + metered override で再試行し、それ でもだめなときだけ fail します。あわせて test-shadow-continui...
summary_text: 以下をそのまま FUGUE に渡せます。 ```text Task: - 本番で forced recovery が最後まで動くように完遂し、GitHub Actions 上で実測確認する。 - 対象ブランチ: kernel/copilot-continuity-20260309 - 最新 push 済み HEAD: 6fe6c69 - 実行条件: - workflow_dispatch: fugue-tutti-caller.yml - issue_number=500 - requested_execution_mode=implement - execution_mode_override=backup-heavy - implement_request=true - implement_confirmed=true - vote_command=true - council_force_missing_provider=glm What is already proven in production: 1. Tutti aggregate side is fixed. - integrated meta now shows: - weighted_vote_passed=true - baseline_trio_gate=recovery-pass - baseline_trio_reason=missing-claude;fallback-quorum=gemini,glm - This is already observed on multiple GHA runs. 2. implement workflow now starts on GitHub-hosted in backup-heavy mode. - codex-implement / implement is no longer skipped. - On latest run it executed on labels ["ubuntu-latest"]. 3. same-repo target checkout is now fixed. - In latest run 23081292359, job 67051124778: - step "Checkout current target repository" = success - step "Checkout external target repository" = skipped - So the old target repo auth failure is gone. Current blocker: - The next failing step is "Checkout orchestration repository". - Latest evidence: - run: 23081292359 - job: 67051124778 - failing step: Checkout orchestration repository - log error: fatal: could not read Username for 'https://github.com': terminal prompts disabled - Because of this, these steps never execute: - Run /vote kernel council preflight - Run /vote kernel council final review - Therefore production verification is still NOT complete. Root cause: - implement job still checks out cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator into .fugue-orchestrator using explicit repository/token fetch on GitHub-hosted. - For this same-repo canary path, that checkout is still hitting auth failure. - Need same-repo-safe orchestration checkout logic, not just target checkout logic. Files to edit: - .github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml - tests/test-vote-command-implement-guard.sh Important current workflow state: - The checkout split fix was originally misplaced into workspace-preflight and was later moved correctly into implement. - Static guard was hardened to inspect the implement: block specifically, not file-global text matches. - Latest relevant commit already on branch: - 6fe6c69 Move checkout split into implement job Suggested next fix: - In implement job, make "Checkout orchestration repository" same-repo-safe. - Likely options: 1. If github.repository == 'cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator', use tokenless actions/checkout@v4 into path .fugue-orchestrator 2. Or avoid second remote checkout entirely and reuse the existing same-repo checkout for orchestration assets - Preserve external-repo path for non-same-repo cases. What must be true before declaring production PASS: 1. run is on latest branch SHA 2. codex-implement / implement runs on ubuntu-latest under backup-heavy 3. Checkout current target repository succeeds 4. Checkout orchestration repository succeeds 5. Run /vote kernel council preflight executes 6. Run /vote kernel council final review executes 7. codex-output-log artifact exists 8. council-status.json exists with: - recovery_attempted=true - baseline_trio_gate=recovery-pass - ok_to_execute=true - force_missing_provider=glm Latest production evidence to inspect: - caller run: 23081292359 - implement job: 67051124778 Useful note: - Ignore workspace-preflight checkout success. It was a false signal earlier. - Only implement job checkout and council steps are valid proof now. Local tests currently passing before next patch: - bash tests/test-vote-command-implement-guard.sh - bash tests/test-kernel-council-review.sh - git diff --check Relevant recent commits: - 42e299e Fix tutti workflow matrix payload for hosted agents - 8879e1a Add Gemini continuity fallback for CI Claude lanes - 4b28ee5 Add shadow continuity baseline recovery policy - adbb996 Honor implement overrides in codex workflow - 3468346 Route backup...
